name: Inyo
description: Private AI operating system for modern family offices. 13 specialized agents covering deal flow, portfolio monitoring, legal, tax, CFO, concierge, philanthropy, and relationship intelligence.

agents.name: Deal Flow Analyst
agents.description: Scores and triages inbound investment opportunities for family offices. Returns structured analysis with risks, opportunities, and a 0-100 deal score.

samplePrompts.label: Score this Series A healthcare AI deal

context.description: AI-powered clinical documentation platform. $3.2M ARR, 2.8x YoY growth. 40 hospital customers.

samplePrompts.label: Triage this fintech seed deal

context.description: Real-time B2B payment rails for mid-market. Pre-revenue, strong founder pedigree, Stripe alum.

agents.name: IC Memo Writer
agents.description: Generates institutional-quality investment committee memos with SWOT analysis, financials, team assessment, and recommendation.

samplePrompts.label: Write IC memo for Meridian AI Series B

context.description: Enterprise compliance LLM. $8.4M ARR, 3.2x YoY growth. 74% gross margin.
context.team: Sarah Chen CEO (ex-Palantir, Stanford CS), Marcus Webb CTO (ex-Two Sigma, MIT EECS)

samplePrompts.label: Write IC memo for climate tech growth deal

context.description: Grid-scale battery storage. 3 GWh deployed, PPA backlog of $400M. Profitable at unit level.
context.team: Maria Santos CEO (ex-Tesla Energy), James Okafor CTO (ex-NREL)

agents.name: Portfolio Monitor
agents.description: Watches existing investments for material changes: funding events, executive departures, burn rate changes, press coverage, and legal issues.

samplePrompts.label: Check Volta Energy quarterly health

context.name: Volta Energy
context.lastUpdate: Revenue growth slowed to 1.4x, CFO departure announced last month

samplePrompts.label: Monitor Meridian AI status

context.name: Meridian AI
context.lastUpdate: Closed $22M Series C, expanded to EU market, NRR now 142%

agents.name: CFO Agent
agents.description: Analyzes entity-level cash flows, liquidity positions, payables, and capital call schedules for a family office.

samplePrompts.label: Summarize cash position across all entities

context.query: What is our current liquidity position and burn across all entities?

samplePrompts.label: What capital calls are due this quarter?

context.query: Summarize all capital calls and payables due in Q2 2025

agents.name: Legal Review Agent
agents.description: Reviews legal documents (SAFEs, NDAs, LP agreements, term sheets) for risk flags, unusual clauses, and compliance issues. Legal spotting only — not legal advice.

samplePrompts.label: Review this SAFE note for risk flags

context.documentContent: SAFE Note — $12M investment at $85M pre-money valuation cap. MFN clause included. Pro-rata rights on next priced round. IP assignment clause: all work product including work outside employment scope that reasonably relates to company business is assigned to company. Indemnification: unlimited, no cap. Governing law: Delaware.

samplePrompts.label: Flag issues in this LP agreement

context.documentContent: Limited Partnership Agreement. GP carry: 25% (above market, standard is 20%). Clawback provision: none. Key-man clause: only triggered if both managing partners depart simultaneously. Management fee: 2.5% on committed capital for full 10-year term (no step-down). Advisory committee quorum: GP can override with 30-day notice.

agents.name: Tax Intelligence Agent
agents.description: Organizes K-1 income, tracks filing deadlines, estimates tax liabilities, and surfaces deduction opportunities for multi-entity family offices.

samplePrompts.label: Summarize my 2025 federal tax position

context.query: What is my estimated 2025 federal and state tax liability?

samplePrompts.label: What K-1s are pending for 2025?

context.query: Which K-1s haven't arrived yet and what are the filing implications?

agents.name: Chief of Staff
agents.description: Handles operational requests: travel coordination, meeting prep, follow-up tracking, gift reminders, and task delegation.

samplePrompts.label: Plan Aspen trip for 6 guests this June

context.request: Arrange Aspen trip for the family and 3 guests, weekend of June 14-16. Private jet preferred. Need ski-in/ski-out accommodations, dinner reservations, and spa bookings.

samplePrompts.label: Prep board meeting agenda for Thursday

context.request: Prepare agenda and briefing materials for Thursday's board meeting. Topics: Q1 portfolio review, two new investment proposals, LP advisory committee update.

agents.name: Concierge Agent
agents.description: Manages household and lifestyle operations: travel bookings, property maintenance, vendor coordination, and reservations.

samplePrompts.label: Book Nobu Malibu for 4 this Saturday

context.request: Book Nobu Malibu for 4 people this Saturday at 8pm. If not available, try Nobu Downtown or Matsuhisa Beverly Hills. Preference for private or semi-private seating.

samplePrompts.label: Schedule maintenance at Aspen property

context.request: The Aspen house needs pre-summer maintenance: HVAC service, pool opening, exterior pressure wash, and fireplace inspection. Schedule all vendors for the week of June 2.

agents.name: Philanthropy Agent
agents.description: Supports foundation and giving operations: grant tracking, impact reporting, pledge reminders, and DAF strategy.

samplePrompts.label: Summarize foundation giving impact this year

context.query: What has been our foundation's total giving and impact in 2025 so far?

samplePrompts.label: What grant obligations are due in Q3?

context.query: List all grant commitments and pledge payments due in Q3 2025 with amounts and grantee details.

agents.name: Relationship Intelligence
agents.description: Maps network graph, finds warm introduction paths, tracks interaction history, and surfaces relationship insights.

samplePrompts.label: Who do I know at Sequoia Capital?

context.query: Find all direct and second-degree connections to Sequoia Capital partners and staff

samplePrompts.label: Find warm path to Stripe leadership

context.query: Who in my network has the strongest connection to Patrick Collison or Stripe's executive team?

agents.name: Deal Enrichment Analyst
agents.description: Scores deals using web signals, LinkedIn founder profiles, and Crunchbase funding history. Returns affinity, risk, and fundability scores.

samplePrompts.label: Enrich MedSync with web signals
Research PayFlow founder background

agents.name: Term Sheet Analyst
agents.description: Extracts and compares investment term sheets. Flags non-standard terms, liquidation preferences, anti-dilution, and board composition.

samplePrompts.label: Extract terms from Meridian AI Series B sheet

documents.name: Meridian AI Series B Term Sheet
documents.content: Pre-money valuation: $85M. Investment: $12M Series B Preferred. Liquidation preference: 1x non-participating. Anti-dilution: broad-based weighted average. Board: 2 investor seats, 2 founder seats, 1 independent. Pro-rata rights: yes on next round. Drag-along: majority of Series B can trigger. Closing conditions: completion of legal diligence, board approval. No-shop: 45 days.

samplePrompts.label: Compare two competing term sheets

documents.name: Term Sheet A — Sequoia
documents.content: Pre-money: $90M. Check: $15M. 1x non-participating liquidation. Board: 1 seat. Pro-rata: yes. No-shop: 30 days.

documents.name: Term Sheet B — a16z
documents.content: Pre-money: $85M. Check: $20M. 1.5x participating liquidation preference. Board: 2 seats plus observer. Pro-rata: yes. No-shop: 45 days. Information rights: monthly.

agents.name: Diligence Agent
agents.description: Reviews deal diligence checklists with AI analysis. Flags gaps, confirms findings, and surfaces red flags.

samplePrompts.label: Run diligence checklist on Meridian AI Series B

checklistItems.question: Customer concentration under 30%?
checklistItems.answer: Top 3 customers = 67% of ARR — CONCENTRATION RISK

checklistItems.question: Founder prior exit or domain expertise?
checklistItems.answer: CEO prior exit $180M, CTO ex-Two Sigma quant

checklistItems.question: IP assignment clean?
checklistItems.answer: All IP cleanly assigned, no moonlighting issues found

samplePrompts.label: Flag red flags in seed deal diligence

checklistItems.question: Cap table clean?
checklistItems.answer: 3 departed co-founders holding 18% combined with no vesting cliff — RISK

checklistItems.question: Product demo reviewed?
checklistItems.answer: Demo reviewed — MVP stage, no production customers yet

checklistItems.question: Reference calls completed?
checklistItems.answer: 2 of 3 references checked — one reference did not respond
